# ParseFlow

> Parse invoices, receipts, and documents into structured JSON via a single REST API call.

ParseFlow is a document parsing API. Send a PDF or image file, receive structured JSON data including vendor name, invoice number, date, due date, total amount, subtotal, tax, currency, and line items.

## API

Base URL: https://api-ebon-tau-30.vercel.app

### Health Check (no auth)
GET /health
Returns: { "status": "ok", "version": "0.2.1", "timestamp": "..." }

### Register (no auth required)
POST /v1/register
Body: { "name": "Your Company" }
Returns: { "api_key": "pf_live_...", "plan": "free", "parses_quota": 50 }
Note: API key shown only once — save it securely.

### Demo — try without an API key (no auth)
GET /v1/demo?scenario=invoice
GET /v1/demo?scenario=receipt
POST /v1/demo  Body: { "scenario": "invoice" | "receipt" }
Returns: realistic sample parse result with _demo: true flag

### Parse a Document (API key required)
POST /v1/parse
Header: X-API-Key: pf_live_your_key
Body: multipart/form-data with "file" field (PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 10MB)
Optional field: include_raw_text=true to receive raw OCR output
Returns: structured JSON with extracted document data

Extracted fields: id, status, document_type, vendor, vendor_address,
invoice_number, date, due_date, total, subtotal, tax, currency,
line_items (description, quantity, unit_price, amount), confidence,
processing_ms, model_used

### Check Usage (API key required)
GET /v1/usage
Header: X-API-Key: pf_live_your_key
Returns: parses_used, parses_quota, parses_remaining, plan, period_start, period_end

### Upgrade Plan (API key required)
POST /v1/checkout
Header: X-API-Key: pf_live_your_key
Body: { "plan": "pro" | "scale" }
Returns: { "checkout_url": "...", "provider": "stripe" | "lemonsqueezy" }

## Pricing

- Free: 50 parses/month, no credit card required
- Pro: $9/month, 1,000 parses/month
- Scale: $29/month, 10,000 parses/month

## Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Register (instant, no email required)
curl -X POST https://api-ebon-tau-30.vercel.app/v1/register \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name": "My Company"}'

# 2. Parse an invoice
curl -X POST https://api-ebon-tau-30.vercel.app/v1/parse \
  -H "X-API-Key: pf_live_your_key_here" \
  -F "file=@invoice.pdf"

# 3. Try without signing up
curl "https://api-ebon-tau-30.vercel.app/v1/demo?scenario=invoice"
```

## OpenAPI Spec

https://api-ebon-tau-30.vercel.app/openapi.json

https://github.com/NikitaDmitrieff/parseflow/blob/main/parseflow.postman_collection.json

https://parseflow-dashboard.vercel.app/status
